caption: A man is seated in a room with walls covered in framed photographs and clothing racks in the background. He is wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "I CN NEVER DO SHIT IT WORK" printed on the front. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone on a stand. To his left, a white mannequin wearing a white garment stands near a clothing rack. On-screen logos appear in the lower corners, including one that reads "REDDY RUFFY" and another circular logo. Across the sequence, the man transitions from a wide, open-mouthed laugh to a more closed-mouth smile, and finally to a neutral expression as he speaks, while remaining in the same seated position throughout.
